verdict_reason: Green criterion (c) fails: the staged benchmark excerpt and manifest evidence do not match Google's official Gemma 4 model card.

findings.description: The benchmark table is not an accurate excerpt of Google's official model card at https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/core/model_card_4. Google reports GPQA Diamond 84.3% and AIME 2026 no tools 89.2% for Gemma 4 31B, while the staged doc states approximately 50% and 30%. This fails green criterion (c).

The manifest evidence for criterion (c) repeats the incorrect benchmark values and asserts they are sourced from Google's official model card. U2 evidence coverage is therefore false evidence, not linked evidence for the acceptance criterion.

The evidence line ranges for criteria (c), (d), and (e) are stale: the benchmark range points before the benchmark table, the fallback range points before the fallback section, and the deferral range points inside the fallback section. U2/U7 linked-evidence integrity is not satisfied.
The content smoke test checks only that strings like GPQA and Phase 4 appear, so it would pass despite the incorrect Google benchmark values. Add value-level coverage for GPQA Diamond and AIME 2026.
